# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Carrier Command 2
- Steam AppID of the game: 1489630

## System Information
- GPU: GeForce RTX 2060 Super
- Video driver version: nvidia-open-dkms 580.95.05
- Kernel version: 6.17.1.arch1-1
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/mxmeinhold/50fb20cca6e85188908913f29668563c
- Proton version: Experimental (build 20516728)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Game runs fine in desktop mode

Game starts fine in VR mode, but as soon as you select "start game" (either campaign or custom) the VR display freezes. The monitor view however successfully shows the loading screen and loads into the game world, and will continue tracking the view angle of the headset and the positions of controllers

[steam-1489630.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23378194/steam-1489630.log)


## Reproduction
1. Launch game in steamVR mode
2. Select "Campaign"

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth2 Sisters Generation
- Steam AppID of the game: 351710

## System Information
- GPU: RX 480
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 20.3.2
- Kernel version: 5.10.6-110-tkg-bmq
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):https://gist.github.com/CygnusTerminal/70e276f032863ea0f3f6337f7ef31b03
- Proton version: 5.0-10/5.13-4

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and drag
and drop the generated `$HOME/steam-$APPID.log` into this issue report -->
[steam-351710.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/5820461/steam-351710.log)


## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Since days ago, this game and the other two (Re;birth 1 and 3) have been running pretty bad on my machine, fights and dungeons are below the 20 FPS mark. In combat, when the characters transform, the FPS go up to my vsync limit, only to go back to 17~20 when it's over. They use OpenGL. Native OpenGL games work like a charm (tested the entire Half-Life 2 franchise and Left 4 Dead franchise). I could observe the GPU usage ranging from values between 0% and 90%, every second. I've tried clean prefixes, disabling compositor manually, gamemode, no gamemode, setting the governor to performance, closing all background apps. Nothing seems to work. On Windows the games work as intended. I have also recorded a video with my external capture card, so the issues can be understood better (https://youtu.be/0JaVWKphLz0). Also, aside from the low quality due to pulseaudio being pulseaudio, and ALSA sounding with enough reverb to blow my eardrums, the popping is very noticiable, this has been an issue i've benn having with Wine/Proton since a month ago.

## Reproduction
Start the game, enter a dungeon/fight/observe the performance.
symptom_summary:
用户在游戏《Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth2 Sisters Generation》中遇到性能问题，战斗和地下城的帧率低于20 FPS，角色变身时帧率短暂提升后又迅速下降。此外，音频存在明显的噼啪声和回声问题。

Tags: Low FPS, Audio Issues, Performance Problems, Visual Glitches

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game: Pioneers of Pagonia - Demo
- Steam AppID of the game: 2552960

https://store.steampowered.com/app/2155180/Pioneers_of_Pagonia/
the demo is playable for everyone

the game is in development, and the developer are on their discord reachable:
https://discord.gg/yfswCNxKCu

## System Information
- Operating System Version: "Manjaro Linux" (64 bit)
- GPU: NVIDIA Corporation NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6GB/PCIe/SSE2
- Video driver version: 4.6.0 NVIDIA 535.104.05
- Kernel version: 6.5.5-2-cachyos
- Link to full system information report: https://gist.github.com/monarc99/10e84b4f7db886bc5712b4f2f0dca197
- Proton version: 8.0-3 and 8.0-4-rc
- Steam Runtime Information gist: https://gist.github.com/monarc99/ae71465ea8a04dce157be4a3c83c1b67

[bugreport-steam-2552960.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/12792592/bugreport-steam-2552960.log)
[bugreport-vkd3d-2552960.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/12792632/bugreport-vkd3d-2552960.log)

## Symptoms 

the report is for the playable demo - the full game will be released in the future.

proton 8.0-3: 

the demo starts and is playable on my system. There are minor graphic bugs. If you want to build a road, some graphic elements are missing.

normally it looks like this in windows 11:
https://pioneers-wiki.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/schnelltest-768x213.webp

with proton you must build the roads and buildings blind. 

But the demo is fully playable on my system. I played the full demo (7 hours)
Some other linux players report a crash, if they build something - even with proton 8.0-3 


proton 8.0-4-rc or any newer proton: regression

the game starts with a error message. If you minimize the error message and open a new map, the game crash, if you place something on the map.

error message at start:
```
System.AggregateException: A Task's exception(s) were not observed either by Waiting on the Task or accessing its Exception property. As a result, the unobserved exception was rethrown by the finalizer thread. (DX12 CreateCommittedResource Failed 80070057)

   --- End of inner exception stack trace ---
```

## Reproduction

compatibility_report:
Satisfactory - mouse over text input box teleports mouse cursor

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/8165.
@Omnifarious posted on 2024-10-15T19:51:25:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Satisfactory
- Steam AppID of the game: 526870

## System Information
- GPU: ATI Radeon 7900 XTX
- Video driver version: Mesa 24.2.4
- Kernel version: 6.11.2-300.fc41.x86_64
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/Omnifarious/8ac4447b69bc9c99c1607ab71727a5a4
- Proton version: Experimental (as of Oct 15, 2024)

I will replace the above bit with my system information from the affected system.

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
I will do this.

## Symptoms
Whenever I mouse over a text input box in the main game, my mouse teleports away from the box.


## Reproduction
Start the game, and then start a new game or load an existing game.
Press 'Q' (the default keybind for the build tool) to bring up a dialogue box of stuff to build.
Go over to the "search for building" box
See your mouse cursor teleport away

Oddly, this works on the system I detail here, which is why I think it's a Proton issue. I suspect this may have something to do with Fedora 41 and the fact it uses Wayland by default. It looks like the game is trying to switch to the system "I-bar" cursor for text entry when moving over a text entry box. And I suspect that mishandling this situation is what's causing the problem.

I should check to see if maybe FSR is causing the problem by getting some part of the system confused about screen space coordinates. Checking that, no effect. And the teleport seems to happen to a fixed location, which wouldn't be the case if it was coordinate confusion.

Link to gist of system that functions correctly: https://gist.github.com/Omnifarious/c521ef6a30543b25eaf20652878a0e1c
symptom_summary:
用户在游戏《Satisfactory》中遇到的问题是，当鼠标悬停在文本输入框上时，鼠标光标会突然传送到其他位置。 

Tag suggestions: 
- Mouse Cursor Issue
- Input Box Glitch
- Teleporting Cursor

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
When going into the options menu either in game or at the launch screen attempting to go to any option other than audio freezes the video. Audio still plays after a bit of being choppy. I thought it was a file permissions issue maybe so I've verified the files and reinstalled completely.

2. Go to options
3. move mouse to save data
4. game freezes
